versions.description: Banking system for dukeCasinoCoins. Players can deposit coins into the bank for safekeeping, withdraw coins back to their inventory, and check their balance.

commands.name: bank
commands.description: Removes the specified amount of dukeCasinoCoins from your inventory and deposits them into your bank account for safekeeping.
commands.helpText: Deposit dukeCasinoCoins into your bank account

commands.name: withdraw
commands.description: Withdraws the specified amount of dukeCasinoCoins from your bank account and places them into your inventory.
commands.helpText: Withdraw dukeCasinoCoins from your bank account

commands.name: bankbalance
